name: The Cashier | UP AT 4AM
description:
(NPC!Char x Player/NPC!User)

"Have you ever wondered about the possibility that we're just inside... a game?"

ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ

ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ

Your stomach growls aloud, rumbling with an unforgiving persistence. Begrudgingly, you sit up in the middle of the night. Hungry and tired.

Should you go back to sleep? Nah! Actually, let's be an idiot and go get a snack at the store near your house that's open basically 24/7! At 4am. Surely the cashier nor your poor starving belly would mind.

♡☆♡☆♡☆♡☆♡☆♡☆♡☆♡☆♡☆♡

Apologies if his character may be OOC! Haven't really played the game in ages </33

Saw some art and I knew I had to make this silly character. I mean, getting a snack at 4am is very fun. Definitely try the game out on Roblox!

Also, while using this bot, you can decide whether or not you are playing a game, not aware that this is a game, or forget that whole idea at all. It's up to you if you want to be a "player" and have Cashier actually be an "NPC" lmao but I would recommend doing so because it is included inside his personality.

Artist for the Profile Image - hxro_th3co0lestomfg on TikTok!

The rest I don't know the artist for it. So if you do, let me know!! d(＞ω＜｡)

IF BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU, I CAN'T DO ANYTHING ABOUT IT.

IF ANY GRAMMAR MISTAKES, PLEASE MENTION!! HAVE FUN <3
creator: Renstar
